basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Institute for Energy Studies (IES), Anna University, Chennai
basic_details.short_information: Anna University IES is recruiting 1 Project Assistant post with B.E./M.E. qualification, last date 20 July 2026.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: Not specified
qualification.education_qualification: B.E. in Mechanical/Chemical/Electrical/Civil/Manufacturing/Production or equivalent and/or M.E. with specialization in Thermal Engineering / Energy Engineering / Solar Energy / Chemical Engineering / Manufacturing

vacancy_details.details: Total Posts: 1 Project Title: Sustainable Drinking Water Solution for Rural and Coastal Tamil Nadu Using Concentrated Solar Thermal Desalination Integrated with Thermal Energy Storage Technology

selection_process: Only shortlisted candidates will be invited for interview. Selection will be based on qualifications
and performance in the interview. The appointment is purely temporary for 24 months. The selected candidate may register for Ph.D. at Anna University
how_to_apply: Visit the Google Form link: https://forms.gle/dc5pNaXbRkF79vT87
Fill the online application form carefully.
Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email for the interview.
Note: No hard copy needs to be sent. No TA/DA will be provided.
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary. HRA/Hostel accommodation will not be provided. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. Selected candidates may pursue Ph.D. at Anna University.

rows.details: B.E. in Mechanical/Chemical/Electrical/Civil/Manufacturing/Production or equivalent and/or M.E. with specialization in Thermal Engineering / Energy Engineering / Solar Energy / Chemical Engineering / Manufacturing

content_sections.heading: Anna University IES Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
Anna University IES Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Only shortlisted candidates will be invited for interview. Selection will be based on qualifications, experience, and performance in the interview. The appointment is purely temporary for 24 months. The selected candidate may register for Ph.D. at Anna University, Chennai.

content_sections.heading: Who should apply for Anna University IES Project Assistant Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Engineering graduates/postgraduates passionate about sustainable energy, solar thermal desalination, and water solutions for rural/coastal areas.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Anna University IES Project Assistant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the Google Form link: https://forms.gle/dc5pNaXbRkF79vT87 Fill the online application form carefully. Submit before 20 July 2026. Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email for the interview. Note: No hard copy needs to be sent. No TA/DA will be provided.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Anna University IES Project Assistant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The position is purely temporary. HRA/Hostel accommodation will not be provided. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. Selected candidates may pursue Ph.D. at Anna University.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Anna University IES Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of online application is 20 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Project Assistant at IES Anna University?
faq.answer: The monthly emoluments are ₹25,000/- consolidated. No HRA or hostel facility is provided.

faq.question: Q3. What qualifications are required for Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have B.E. in Mechanical/Chemical/Electrical/Civil/Manufacturing/Production or equivalent and/or M.E. with specialization in Thermal/Energy/Solar/Chemical/Manufacturing Engineering.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are there in Anna University IES Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy for the Project Assistant post.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for IES Anna University Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the advertisement.

faq.question: Q6. What is the duration of the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The duration of the project is 24 months.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for Anna University CMRG Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: Apply through the Google Form link: https://forms.gle/dc5pNaXbRkF79vT87 before 20 July 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Will selected candidates get PhD opportunity?
faq.answer: Yes, the selected candidate may register for the Ph.D. Program at Anna University, Chennai.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for Anna University IES Project Assistant?
faq.answer: Selection is based on shortlisting followed by personal interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be called.

faq.question: Q10. What is the project title for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Sustainable Drinking Water Solution for Rural and Coastal Tamil Nadu Using Concentrated Solar Thermal Desalination Integrated with Thermal Energy Storage Technology.
